content_fingerprint: deepseek v4 lands on hugging face community blog drawing attention for one million token context window a deepseek v4 model capable of processing up to one million tokens in a single context has surfaced in hugging face s community blog feed positioning it as a notable candidate for agentic and long document workflows deepseek v4 has appeared in the hot section of the hugging face community blog drawing reader interest for its support of a one million token context window a scale that substantially exceeds the context limits of most commercially available models the model developed by chinese
